title: Heavy Water Assays by GC-Mass Spectrometry
author: Henri Brunengraber
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ydsfs6e

steps.title: Quantitation by ²H ² O Standard Curve:
steps.instruction: Quantitation by ²H ² O Standard Curve:

steps.title: Standards are made from deuterium oxide (Aldrich
steps.instruction: Standards are made from deuterium oxide (Aldrich

steps.title: Pipette 10μl of plasma or standard into Eppendorf
steps.instruction: Pipette 10μl of plasma or standard into Eppendorf

steps.title: ²H ² O standards a
steps.instruction: ²H ² O standards a. Blank (MQ H ² O) b. 0.1% D ² O in (MQ H ² O) c. 0.5% D ² O in (MQ H ² O) d. 0.10% D ² O in (MQ H ² O) e. 1.5% D ² O in (MQ H ² O) f. 2.0% D ² O in (MQ H ² O) g. 2.5% D ² O in (MQ H ² O) h. 3.0% D ² O in (MQ H ² O) i. 3.5% D ² O in (MQ H ² O) j. 4.0% D ² O in (MQ H ² O)

steps.title: Add 2μl of a 10N NaOH...
steps.instruction: Add 2μl of a 10N NaOH solution to each sample or standard

steps.title: Add 4μl of acetone/acetonitrile solution (10μl...
steps.instruction: Add 4μl of acetone/acetonitrile solution (10μl of acetone +200μl of acetonitrile) to each sample

steps.title: Be careful when taking samples out...
steps.instruction: Be careful when taking samples out of the centrifuge to make sure that all of the drops are at the bottom of the tube

steps.title: Cap and briefly centrifuge samples (~5sec)...
steps.instruction: Cap and briefly centrifuge samples (~5sec) to ensure NaOH and acetonitrile react with sample

steps.title: Let samples sit overnight (at least 10hrs)
steps.instruction: Let samples sit overnight (at least 10hrs)

steps.title: Add 500μl of chloroform to samples
steps.instruction: Add 500μl of chloroform to samples

steps.title: Add ~ 50mg Na 2 SO...
steps.instruction: Add ~ 50mg Na 2 SO 4 salt to each sample

steps.title: Centrifuge sample for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge sample for 2 minutes

steps.title: Pipette 100μl of chloroform layer into...
steps.instruction: Pipette 100μl of chloroform layer into glass insert, place inserts in GC vials and cap, then assay on a GC-MS system, EI mode (see below for parameters and references).

steps.title: H ² 18 O standards
steps.instruction: H ² 18 O standards: a. Blank (MQ H ² O) b. 0.01% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O) c. 0.05% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O) d. 0.10% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O) e. 0.15% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O) f. 0.20% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O) g. 0.25% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O) h. 0.30% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O) i. 0.35% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O) j. 0.40% H ² 18 O in (MQ H ² O)

steps.title: H ² 18 O assay
steps.instruction: H ² 18 O assay: 5 ul of blood or plasma sample or standard into a 12 x 75-mm glass tube

steps.title: Then add ~3 mg of PCl5...
steps.instruction: Then add ~3 mg of PCl5 to samples or standards to generate phosphoric acid; let stand for 20 min

steps.title: To generate TMP, then react samples...
steps.instruction: To generate TMP, then react samples or standards by adding 300 µl of freshly prepared etheral-diazomethane (to derivatize samples) and allow to stand at room temperature during reaction, until the ether evaporated; may use an additional 120µl of diethyl ether in hexane solution

steps.title: TMP is extracted by addition of...
steps.instruction: TMP is extracted by addition of 150 ul of water and 600 µl of chloroform (1:4 ratio) followed by addition of 0.5 g Na 2 SO 4

steps.title: Samples are then vigorously mixed, and...
steps.instruction: Samples are then vigorously mixed, and a small aliquot of the chloroform is transferred to a GC-MS vial and assayed on GC-MS system, EI mode Gas Chormatography Mass Spectrometry, GC-MS (EI mode): Acetone and the TMP derivatives are analyzed using an Agilent 5973N-MSD equipped with an Agilent 6890 GC system, and a DB-17MS capillary column (30 m x 0.25 mm x 0.25 um). The mass spectrometer is operated in the electron impact mode (EI; 70 eV), (1,4).

steps.title: Selective ion monitoring of mass-to-charge ratios (m/z) a
steps.instruction: Selective ion monitoring of mass-to-charge ratios (m/z) a. For ²H enrichments monitor acetone (58,

steps.title: and for 18 O enrichments monitor TMP (140,
steps.instruction: and for 18 O enrichments monitor TMP (140,

steps.title: b
steps.instruction: b. The ²H enrichments are calculated from the²H ² O standard curve and the 18 O enrichments are calculated from the signal ratio (142)/(142 + 140).
